description: Implement Pinecone and Chroma vector store support for RAG system. Current RAG only supports SQLite. CLI help mentions Pinecone/Chroma but implementations are missing. Need complete VectorStore interface implementations for both providers with namespace/collection support.
goal: Add production-ready Pinecone and Chroma vector store backends to enable scalable RAG deployments
requirements: Test both stores with Ollama embeddings

functional: CLI --store flag works with pinecone and chroma
Both stores tested with 768-dim Ollama embeddings
Error handling for missing API keys
